question: what is the difference between plan A and plan B?
content:
Plan A could be for example bowl straighter just outside the urethane traffic to use their carry down as a hold inside your breakpoint... and a plan B could be jumping quite deeper inside to stay away from that urethane traffic leaving it as far out as the lane and pattern allows you, so you couldnt use the carry down as a hold, but you would make sure to stay away enough as to be able to miss your breakppoint a little to the outside too without reaching that carry down area.

Example fron a possible PLAN A:

“I’m going to stand a bit right, play straighter, and keep my breakpoint just outside the urethane line. If they’ve created carrydown, I’ll use that as my hold when I miss inside.”

Example fron a possible PLAN B:
“I’m jumping deeper inside so I’m completely away from the urethane zone. I won’t use their carrydown at all, I’ll just make sure my miss to the outside never reaches it.”
